name: ayush-portfolio
description: Full Stack Portfolio Website for Ayush Kamboj

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run build"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"

author: Ayush Kamboj
